chunks.text: EECS faculty, students, staff and alumni are central to our success as one of the most thriving and distinguished departments on the Berkeley campus.
chunks.question: Who is central to the success of the EECS department at Berkeley?

chunks.text: Browse Faculty: All Faculty, Faculty Awards, In Memoriam, More Faculty Lists, Including current, emeriti, and visiting faculty.
chunks.question: What categories are available for browsing EECS faculty?
chunks.answer: All faculty, awards, in memoriam, and lists.

chunks.text: Browse Alumni: EE Distinguished Alumni Award Winners, CS Distinguished Alumni Award Winners, Alumni Entrepreneurial Activities, More Alumni Lists.
chunks.question: What alumni-related sections can be browsed on the EECS page?

chunks.text: Browse Students: Student Organizations, Student Awards, Grad Homepages, More Student Lists, Student organizations and award winners; graduate student directories.
chunks.question: What student information is accessible on the EECS website?

chunks.text: Browse Administration and Staff: Leadership, Staff, Administrative Organizational Chart, Notable Women of EECS.
chunks.question: What administration and staff details are provided?
chunks.answer: Leadership, staff, chart, and notable women.
